subject: Super Saiyan warrior with golden aura and lightning energy, mid-shot forward-facing, intense determined expression
description: A Super Saiyan humanoid figure occupies the center frame in a mid-shot composition. The figure's hair is raised in the classic spiky Super Saiyan form with a golden-yellow aura radiating outward and crackling lightning energy surrounding the body. The expression is intense and determined, eyes forward. The background is washed in electric blue-white energy light. No weapon is visible — the figure's power manifests as raw aura rather than any held prop.
foreground: Super Saiyan figure with golden aura and crackling lightning
